channel.title: AI on Aman Ahuja
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Aman Ahuja

item.title: Privacy Review Skill
item.description:
I “published” a skill I’ve been using. Where “published” = “pushed to a public repo”.

It’s been a helpful tool, in case you want to try it out:

GitHub - amanahuja/privacy-skills: Agent skills for privacy policy analysis.

Review a privacy policy or terms of service against a structured scorecard. Combines ToS;DR's human-curated ratings with LLM analysis.

Use it next time instead of just clicking "Accept"!
